---
title: "MCA Listmode Event Analysis"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: config
#| tags: [parameters]

FILENAME = "D:/work/measurements/ch2_20260629_163156_005.h5"
HIST_BINS = 16384
HIST_RANGE = (0, 65536)
```

# Load Data

```{python}
#| label: load
import h5py
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from fast_histogram import histogram1d

with h5py.File(FILENAME, "r") as f:
    events = f["events"][:]
    energy = f["energy"][:]
    psd_zc = f["psd_zc"][:]
    channel = f.attrs["channel"]
    timestamp = f.attrs["recording_timestamp"]
    total_events = f.attrs["total_events"]

print(f"File: {FILENAME}")
print(f"Channel: {channel}")
print(f"Total events: {total_events}")
print(f"Event dtype: {events.dtype}")
```

# Event Statistics

```{python}
#| label: stats
timestamps_s = events["timestamp"].astype(np.float64) * 8e-9

duration = timestamps_s[-1] - timestamps_s[0] if len(timestamps_s) > 1 else 0
rate = total_events / duration if duration > 0 else 0

print(f"Duration: {duration:.2f} s")
print(f"Average count rate: {rate:.1f} cps")
print()
print(f"Energy: min={energy.min()}, max={energy.max()}, "
      f"mean={energy.mean():.1f}, std={energy.std():.1f}")
print(f"Short energy: min={events['short_energy'].min()}, "
      f"max={events['short_energy'].max()}")
print(f"PSD ZC: min={psd_zc.min():.4f}, max={psd_zc.max():.4f}, "
      f"mean={psd_zc.mean():.4f}")
print(f"Markers: unique={np.unique(events['marker'])}")
```

# Energy Histogram

```{python}
#| label: energy-histogram
#| fig-cap: "Energy spectrum built with fast_histogram"
hist = histogram1d(energy.astype(np.float64), range=HIST_RANGE, bins=HIST_BINS)
bin_edges = np.linspace(HIST_RANGE[0], HIST_RANGE[1], HIST_BINS + 1)
bin_centers = 0.5 * (bin_edges[:-1] + bin_edges[1:])

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 5))
ax.step(bin_centers, hist, where="mid", linewidth=0.5, color="C0")
ax.fill_between(bin_centers, hist, step="mid", alpha=0.3, color="C0")
ax.set_xlabel("Channel")
ax.set_ylabel("Counts")
ax.set_title(f"Energy Spectrum ({total_events} events, {HIST_BINS} bins)")
ax.set_xlim(HIST_RANGE)
ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

nonzero = hist[hist > 0]
print(f"Non-zero bins: {len(nonzero)} / {HIST_BINS}")
print(f"Max counts in single bin: {hist.max()}")
print(f"Total counts: {hist.sum()}")
```

# Energy Histogram (Log Scale)

```{python}
#| label: energy-histogram-log
#| fig-cap: "Energy spectrum (log scale)"
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 5))
ax.step(bin_centers, hist, where="mid", linewidth=0.5, color="C0")
ax.fill_between(bin_centers, hist, step="mid", alpha=0.3, color="C0")
ax.set_xlabel("Channel")
ax.set_ylabel("Counts")
ax.set_title("Energy Spectrum (log scale)")
ax.set_yscale("log")
ax.set_xlim(HIST_RANGE)
ax.set_ylim(bottom=0.5)
ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

# PSD Scatter Plot

```{python}
#| label: psd-scatter
#| fig-cap: "Pulse Shape Discrimination: Energy vs PSD ZC"
max_points = min(50000, total_events)
if total_events > max_points:
    idx = np.random.default_rng(42).choice(total_events, max_points, replace=False)
    e_plot = energy[idx]
    p_plot = psd_zc[idx]
else:
    e_plot = energy
    p_plot = psd_zc

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))
ax.scatter(e_plot, p_plot, s=0.2, alpha=0.3, c="C0", rasterized=True)
ax.set_xlabel("Energy [channel]")
ax.set_ylabel("PSD ZC")
ax.set_title(f"PSD Scatter ({len(e_plot)} events)")
ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

# Count Rate Over Time

```{python}
#| label: count-rate
#| fig-cap: "Count rate vs time (1 s bins)"
if duration > 1:
    time_bins = np.arange(timestamps_s[0], timestamps_s[-1], 1.0)
    rate_hist = histogram1d(timestamps_s, range=(timestamps_s[0], timestamps_s[-1]),
                            bins=max(1, int(duration)))
    time_centers = np.arange(len(rate_hist)) + 0.5

    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 4))
    ax.step(time_centers, rate_hist, where="mid", color="C1", linewidth=0.8)
    ax.fill_between(time_centers, rate_hist, step="mid", alpha=0.3, color="C1")
    ax.set_xlabel("Time [s]")
    ax.set_ylabel("Counts per second")
    ax.set_title("Count Rate")
    ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()

    print(f"Mean rate: {rate_hist.mean():.1f} cps")
    print(f"Std rate: {rate_hist.std():.1f} cps")
else:
    print("Duration too short for count rate plot")
```
